title: Instagram is dropping end-to-end encryption soon: Here are 5 secure messaging apps you can use instead

title: Techie shrinks dog's tumor by half after using ChatGPT to design ‘first personalized cancer vaccine’
summary: Techie Paul Conyngham developed a custom mRNA vaccine for his dog, Rose, using ChatGPT and AlphaFold. The AI-assisted process involved genomic sequencing, leading to a significant reduction in her tumor size, illustrating AI's transformative role in veterinary medicine.

title: India's NavIC satellite system faces challenge as IRNSS-1F failed after atomic clock malfunction: what we know
summary: India's NavIC GPS alternative faces challenges after satellite IRNSS-1F failed, reducing operational satellites to three. A minimum of four is needed for complete coverage. The Union government last year stated that only four of the 11 satellites deployed for the NavIC system were fully operational.

The round also marks Shastra VC’s first investment in India’s semiconductor ecosystem.

title: China's No. 2 chipmaker readies 7 nm production as Beijing ramps up self-suffiency drive
summary: The group's contract chipmaking business, Huali ​Microelectronics, is readying a 7-nanometre (nm) chipmaking process at its plant in Shanghai, the people said, which would make it the second Chinese chipmaker with such advanced technologies. Hua Hong is China's second-largest chipmaker.

title: KC Ang quits as head of Tata Semiconductor Manufacturing
summary: KC Ang has resigned as president and head of Tata Semiconductor Manufacturing, citing personal reasons. A veteran with decades in the chip industry, Ang had led Tata Electronics’ foundry operations. The company says it has a strong leadership team to continue its major semiconductor projects.
